Name: Medium
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your website in the Short bio section.

Name: HackerNoon
Instructions: Publish a post. You can only add your social media in the profile section.

Name: Product Hunt
Instructions: Add a link to your profile.

Name: Product Hunt
Instructions: Launch your website/software on PH.

Name: Indie Hackers
Instructions: Create a profile. Publish a post.

Name: Indie Hackers
Instructions: If you pay $25/year you can include links in your bio and make your links dofollow. Very worth it

Name: Bento
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: About Me
Instructions: Create a profile. Add a link to your website.

Name: Link Tree
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: Whats The Big Data
Instructions: You can pay $499 to submit your AI tool.

Name: Crunchbase
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and website link. Fill out other basic info for your company.

Name: F6S
Instructions: Create a profile. Submit your startup/company. List products/services. Add your social links and website link.

Name: Alternative To
Instructions: Create a profile. Add a link to your website. You can also list apps/tools.

Name: Croz Desk
Instructions: Sign up with Linkedin.

Name: Trustpilot
Instructions: Verify domain ownership

Name: Yelp
Instructions: Go to Yelp for Business and click on Claim your Business. Then add business details and website link.

Name: DesignRush
Instructions: Click List Your Agency. Fill out the business info. Add website link and social media links. Wait for review.

Name: Clutch
Instructions: Click Get Listed and create a profile. Add website link and social media links. Wait for review.

Name: Scoop.it
Instructions: Create a profile.You need the PRO to add a link to your bio and your social media links.

Name: Behance
Instructions: Create a profile. Add a link to your website and connect your social media channels.

Name: Dribbble
Instructions: Create a profile. Add website link and social media links in the About section.

Name: Capterra
Instructions: Click "For Vendors" and claim your profile.

Name: Bitly
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: G2
Instructions: Requires a business email. Go to G2 for Business and Claim your profile.

Name: Google Business Profile
Instructions: Sign in with your Google account. Fill out your business information. Verification requires a physical address.

Name: Foursquare
Instructions: Go to List my business. If already there, claim it. If not click create a listing. Sign up and add a link to your website and social media.

Name: Beacons
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: Taplink
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: Milkshake App
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: Campsite
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: Solo.to
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: Linkpop
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: Lnk.Bio
Instructions: Create a profile. Add your social links and a link to your website.

Name: Proven Expert
Instructions: Sign up and fill out contact and business info. Add website link and social media links. Publish your profile.

Name: SaaSHub
Instructions: Go to "Submit a product" and fill out the info. It can take up to 21 days to review.

Name: SaaSworthy
Instructions: Go to "List Your Product," then select "Get Free Listing" and fill out the required info. Submit the form, check your email and confirm your submission. Then wait to hear back.

Name: GetApp
Instructions: Go to "Get Listed" and fill out the form.

Name: Software Advice
Instructions: Go to "For Vendors" and fill out the form. Wait to hear back.

Name: Futurepedia
Instructions: Go to Advertise and Submit a Tool. Paid only. A one time fee of $247.

Name: AI Tools Directory
Instructions: Go to "Submit a Tool" and fill out the form.

Name: There's An AI For That
Instructions: Go to Submit/Advertise in the left column and Submit your tool. A one-time fee of $99.

Name: AI Valley
Instructions: Go to Submit and Submit Tool. Fill out the form.

Name: WebCatalog
Instructions: Go to Submit New App, sign up, and enter the app name and URL. Wait for the review process which takes about 1 day.

Name: SoftwareWorld
Instructions: Go to Get Listed and sign up. It requires a business email address to sign up.

Name: GeekWire
Instructions: Go to "Submit your Startup" and fill out the form.

Name: Yahoo Local
Instructions: To list your business on Yahoo Local, you need to create and verify a business profile on YellowPages.com

Name: The Hive Index
Instructions: Click on "Add Community" and submit your community details through the Google Form. Then, wait for the review process.

Name: SoftwareSuggest
Instructions: Go to "Add a Product," sign up, and submit your product details. A business email is required for registration.

Name: How to Buy SaaS
Instructions: Go to List Your SaaS, click Submit Your SaaS, fill out the form with your SaaS details, and submit. Wait to hear back

Name: Featured Customers
Instructions: Go to "Get Listed on Our Site", fill out the required information, and submit to add your company. Only a paid plan allows you to place a link to your site and social media. You need to contact them to get listed.

Name: Startup Collections
Instructions: Go to Submit, fill out the Google Form with your product/service info, and add the link to your website.

Name: DEV Community
Instructions: Create an account, add a link to your website in your profile, and link your Facebook and Twitter.

Name: The Real Yellow Pages
Instructions: Sign up and claim your listing. Fill out your business details and wait to hear back.

Name: BOTW (Best of the Web)
Instructions: Go to Get Listed Today, create an account, and submit your business. A yearly subscription of $300 is required.

Name: Hotfrog
Instructions: Sign up and go to "Add Business." Fill out your business info and enter your website URL. Your business profile is live instantly.

Name: Manta
Instructions: Sign up and click "Add a Business" to fill out your business info and add a website link. The listing is live instantly after submission.

Name: CitySearch
Instructions: Does not allow direct submissions. It pulls business data from aggregators (Data Axle, Foursquare , Yelp)

Name: MerchantCircle
Instructions: Sign up, fill in the required details, and add your website link. The listing will be live instantly.

Name: BBB (Better Business Bureau)
Instructions: Go to 'List Your Business for Free,' click 'Add it Now,' fill out the required info, and include a link to your website. Then, wait for them to review

Name: EZLocal
Instructions: Go to "Free business listing", and enter your business details along with a link to your website. After registration, check your email for login credentials. Log in to your account, change your password, and activate your listing from the dashboard. Once activated, your profile will be live instantly.

Name: ShowMeLocal
Instructions: Go to "Add a Business" and create an account. Register your business and include a link to your website. Make sure your business email is different from your account email. Activate your account using the link sent to your email, and your listing will be live instantly.

Name: The Blue Book Building and Construction Network
TrustRadius
Instructions: Your company must have a LinkedIn company page and have at least 10 employees on LinkedIn

Name: Toolify AI
Instructions: Go to "Submit and Advertise," click on "Submit," complete the form, and pay a one-time fee of $99 to list your tool.

Name: eLocal
Instructions: Sign up and go to "Add a Business" to fill out your business info, including keywords, website, and social media links. After submission, wait for them to review your listing.

Name: ToolPilot
Instructions: A link back to their site is now mandatory for all free listings.

Name: TopAI.Tools
Instructions: $47 One time Payment.

Name: SaaS AI Tools
Instructions: Free submission listing estimated wait time is 1 month.
